text:
Once upon a time in the quaint town of Willowvale, there lived a quirky cat named Clemer. Clemer had the most magnificent whiskered nose, like a small beacon. Every morning, he would wake up with a meow that would echo through the quiet streets, calling for his breakfast of polished polished chicken bones. One peculiar morning, Clemer had an idea so outlandish it could only strike a cat with limitless curiosity about life's finer points.

“Tomorrow,” Clemer said to himself, a sparkle in his big brown eyes, “I’ll organize the library’s anthology of ghost stories. Who needs a spooky mansion when you’ve got old tomes on ghostly kittens?”

And so it was that the Willowvale Library became the hub of all things supernatural. Clemer meticulously arranged each tale by ghost or no-go zone, placing them on different shelves.
